description: This watch from puma comes in a clean sleek design. The silver and black combination of this watch is a great way to glam up casual wear.Case diameter: 32 mmCase thickness: 8 mmDial shape: SquareWarranty: 2 YearsMetal case with a fixed bezel for added durability, style and comfort Synthetic leather straps with a buckle clasp for comfort and styleBlack dial with cat logo above 6 o& rsquo clock 12'o clock marked in silver glittery number for added styleDial with three hand movement Quartz movement of time display Screw on the side to reset time Solid case back made of stainless steel for enhanced durabilityWater resistant upto 50 metres
